narrative:
15 congressional district has 514,075 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.2% D−R vs -12.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
